message:
🌱 Add argo-events: Parameterization a block of k8s resource (set of key values) mission (#897)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-2272-parameterization-a-block-of-k8s-resource-set-of-key-values",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Parameterization a block of k8s resource (set of key values)",
+    "description": "Parameterization a block of k8s resource (set of key values). This issue affects 17+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-events troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-events deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nI am trying to parametrize an entire block of k8s trigger using payload. the payload converted to string with backslashes and can't be injected to overwrite the block."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Parameterization a block of k8s resource (set of key values)",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\nActual state: \"{\\\"image\\\":\\\"docker/whalesay:latest\\\",\\\"command\\\":[\\\"cowsay\\\"],\\\"args\\\":[\\\"injected\\\"]}\"\n Desired state: \"{\"image\":\"docker/whalesay:latest\",\"command\":[\"cowsay\"],\"args\":[\"injected\"]}\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Parameterization a block of k8s resource (set of… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/2272",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Actual state: \"{\\\"image\\\":\\\"docker/whalesay:latest\\\",\\\"command\\\":[\\\"cowsay\\\"],\\\"args\\\":[\\\"injected\\\"]}\"\n Desired state: \"{\"image\":\"docker/whalesay:latest\",\"command\":[\"cowsay\"],\"args\":[\"injected\"]}\"",
+        "{\n  \"injected\": {\n    \"image\": \"docker/whalesay:latest\",\n    \"command\": ,\n    \"args\": [\n      \"injected\"\n    ]\n  }\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-events"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/2272",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events"
+    },
+    "reactions": 17,
+    "comments": 0,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:19:52.173Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",

+}
